title: More Industrial Foregoing Addons (MIFA)
description: Introduces higher tiers of efficiency, processing, and speed addons, along with detailed tooltips
body:
This mod adds additional efficiency, processing and speed addons to [Industrial Foregoing](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing), along with detailed tooltips.

![Addon: Efficiency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ig6QciUH/images/f1ac44cfc69e8646432cf5486be213db8b9a1111.gif)

![Addon: Processing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ig6QciUH/images/f464a9449cca38387481d7df438c2e9e62a60285.gif)

![Addon: Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ig6QciUH/images/7026e7d81112f16783505ffd02a6ff40c57079b1.gif)
